name: Daily Aging Report -- Unpaid Invoices to Slack

parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT
  mongo_account_id,
  COUNT(invoice_id)                  AS invoice_count,
  ROUND(SUM(balance), 2)             AS total_outstanding,
  MIN(DATE(invoice_date))            AS oldest_invoice_date,
  MAX(DATE(invoice_date))            AS newest_invoice_date
FROM `guesty-data.zuora_analytics.invoices`
WHERE status = 'Posted'
  AND balance > 0
  AND DATE(invoice_date) < DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
GROUP BY mongo_account_id
ORDER BY total_outstanding DESC
